news.t: Defiance Daily Target 2X Short SMCI ETF (SMCZ) Trading Halt
Defiance Launches SMCZ: 2X Short ETF for Super Micro Computer, Inc.

holdings.infoBox: SMCZ is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 37.80%, OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 30.45%, First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 17.01%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 14.71%, and Cash Offset at 5.98%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Short SMCI ETF (SMCZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to provide 200% inverse exposure to the daily share price movement of Super Micro Computer (SMCI), less fees and expenses. The fund uses swaps to provide exposure. SMCZ was launched on Mar 31, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
